# Papers

## 2026

- Graph Learning with L0-norm and SLOPE Penalties[Open PDF](papers/pdf/masters_thesis.pdf)

## 2025

- Conditional Mixture-of-Experts for Distribution Regression[Open PDF](papers/pdf/moe.pdf)

- Divergence-Optimized Data Fusion that Enhances AI-Based Electrocardiogram Arrhythmia Detection[Open PDF](papers/pdf/npj.pdf)
